programme.title: Adventures of ZeZe Zebra: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star / Row Your Boat / Incy Wincy Spider / Mary Had a Little Lamb / Head and Shoulders Knees and Toes
programme.desc: Zeze and her friends star gaze and meet a little star that takes them to the moon. / Zeze and Hip-po row in a boat up a stream and find a Mouse, a Lion, and a Croc. / Zeze and her friends meet a spider and have a nice afternoon tea party, despite all the bad weather. / Zeze wakes up alongside a cute and rebellious lamb who likes bending the rules. / Head and Shoulders Knees and Toes.

programme.title: The Bumble Nums: Ballooning Blueberry Cobbler / Flying Dragon Fruit Cake
programme.desc: Mmm. The Bumble Nums are making Ballooning Blueberry Cobbler. But first, they need to catch ten ballooning blueberries before they blow away! Humble, Grumble, and Stumble do their best to nab the airborne blueberries, but how can they get the ten fast-inflating fruit into their tiny baskets before the Cooking Countdown? / Hear ye, hear ye! Today, the ever-brave Bumble Nums go on an adventure back in time to make a Flying Dragon Fruit Cake. They need to catch four flying dragon fruit, but it isn't so simple when the fruit is flying and fire-breathing! Lady Humble, Sir Grumble, and Sir Stumble's knightly skills are put to the test to try and bring the dragon fruit to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown.

programme.title: Grumpy Greg: Detective Greg The Inspector / Microbes / Red-Handed / Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: One day Greg found Shelley crying. As it turned out, her statue disappeared from the fish tank and Shelley didn't know what to do. Eager to help his friend, Greg decided to become a detective and find the missing statue! / Greg was reading his newspaper and saw an article about microbes. Oh no, he urgently needs to clean up! / One day, Zibidi got really hungry. She knew that Greg had all the food in the world, so she decided to see if he would share some. But Greg was sound asleep, so she couldn't ask him whether she could have some seeds. / Luckily, Greg was taking a nap. It was a perfect time to borrow some snacks from his closet. Booboo and Zibidi are a great team. But on that day an unexpected obstacle appeared: one of the snack closet doors got stuck.

programme.title: Mr. Mender and the Chummyjiggers: Thank You Scribblies
programme.desc: The Chummies learn how to say thank you to the scribblies.

programme.title: Luna Chip & Inkie Adventure Rangers Go: The Great Frog Unclog
programme.desc: It's a frogvasion! Eagle Creekers are finding frogs in vegetable bins at the General Store, under hats and even in their bathtubs! It looks like the citizens will have to move unless the Adventure Rangers can lure the little hoppers back to their home pond. But even dressing Chip up as a big, juicy mosquito doesn't draw the frogs away. Finally, the Rangers investigate why the frogs have moved and find that their pond is filled with litter! All they have to do is clean up that mess and everyone will be happy. Except for Chip, who is still dressed as that tasty mosquito.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Unsinkable Molly Mabray
programme.desc: Inspired by Daniel's tall tales of sailing on the high seas, Molly, Tooey, and Trini decide to build their own sailboat!

programme.title: Tales of Tatonka: The Great Berry Race / Earthquake
programme.desc: The wolf-cubs have organized a race to find the juicy berries Poum has mentioned. The winner who arrives first gets the most berries. Poum has to decide whether to continue to cheat or help a friend in need. / An earthquake has destroyed Tap-Tap's dam and the young beaver is at risk of being easy prey. The wolf-cubs help her to rebuild her habitat.

programme.title: Krewcraft: Who sent this letter!?
programme.desc: Who sent us this letter!?

programme.desc: Misha's school has a basketball game scheduled against another school. The kids from there are tall, strong and word has it, are very good players. Misha's team is nervous but they know that no one can compete with Gina Giraffe. Gina, however, breaks a leg and can't play, so they have to find a substitute. / Misha is not feeling well. She has a high fever and a little problem: she doesn't want to take the medicine, because it tastes really bad. Her grandfather brings her a book to read while she rests in bed. As she reads the book, she enters into the story. Suddenly she finds herself in a faraway place and doesn't know how to get home.

programme.title: The Dodo
programme.desc: This lost snake is covered in ticks and dehydrated! Her rescuers bring her home and get her right into the bath to help get the ticks off. But when she's had a drink and all of the ticks are gone, her skin still has cuts... what are they going to do? / Ronan's a tiny bat who just wants to fly like his older friends. But he's still just a baby! He's great at hanging upside down, but before he can try flying, he'll have to get much bigger. He'll have to practice flapping his wings, eating on his own so he can get really strong, and pickup up tips from the other bats in the colony! / Tiny Tim's a baby bunny who was born way smaller than his bigger brothers and sisters. He wants to hang out and play with them but needs to get so much bigger before he can. Let's watch him grow up!

programme.title: Challenge Squad

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: Ruth & Alex
programme.desc: When Ruth and Alex first moved to Brooklyn, it was the 1970s — years before gentrification, and years before they would realise that they won't always be physically able to climb several flights of stairs just to get home. Still highly active, yet feeling the undeniable effects of age, the couple opts to put their apartment on the market and over one crazy weekend, they discover that finding a new apartment is not about winding down but starting a whole new adventure!

programme.title: Switched
programme.desc: Tired of being bullied, Cassandra Evans prays that her nemesis, Katie Sharp, the queen bee of social media, would know what it's like to walk a day in her shoes. Her prayer is answered in an unexpected way when they get "Switched."

programme.title: Mad Families
programme.desc: Focuses on three families – one Hispanic, one African American, one Caucasian – who find themselves sharing the same camping space on a Fourth of July holiday weekend. When none of them volunteer to vacate the site, they decide on a series of competitions to determine a winner.

programme.title: Dick
programme.desc: The year is 1972 and like most high-school students, Betsy Jobs (Kirsten Dunst) and Arlene Lorenzo (Michelle Williams) just want to have a good time. But when, during a class field trip to the White House, they cluelessly wander into a behind-closed-doors, top-secret shredding session, it's time toboth wag the dog, and walk it. Seeking to uncover just how much the witless duo discovered, the Commander-In-Chief, appoints them "Official White House Dog Walkers," and it isn't long before the girls go from taking out Checkers, to taking out Tricky Dick, in this fun-raising comedy of historic distortions.

programme.title: Holy Water
programme.desc: A rural Irish village will never be the same again after a group of bachelors hijack a truck full of Viagra pills as part of a get-rich-quick scheme. With special ops on their case, the boys hide the loot down the Church's Holy Well... only for it to seep out into the town's water supply.

programme.title: Priceless
programme.desc: Set against the wildly atmospheric backdrop of the French Riviera, Jean (Gad Elmaleh), a shy young bartender is mistaken for a millionaire by beautiful scheming opportunist Irene (Audrey Tautou). Abandoned when she discovers his true identity, a love-struck Jean has no intention of letting someone this gorgeous get away! Jean's comical attempts to gain Irene's affection gradually evolve to him setting himself up as a gigolo at the luxury hotel she is staying at...and then the fun really begins. A sexy and thoroughly charming romantic comedy, if you love Breakfast at Tiffany's, you'll love this.

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: Barbara Thorson (Madison Wolfe) is a teenage girl who escapes the realities of school and a troubled family life by retreating into her magical world of fighting evil giants. With the help of her new friend Sophia (Sydney Wade) and her school counsellor (Zoe Saldana), Barbara learns to face her fears and battle the giants that threaten her world.

programme.title: Iceman
programme.desc: Ying (Donnie Yen, Ip Man, 14 Blades, Hero), a highly skilled martial arts warrior of the Ming Dynasty palace guard, is ordered to escort the precious Golden Wheel of Time, said to have the power of time travel and ability to see into the future, from Sindu back to China. Along his perilous journey he is wrongly accused of a murder and hunted by his three brothers, Yuanlong (Simon Yam, Lara Croft Tomb Raider) Sao, and Niehu, all bent on revenge. At the height of battle all four are buried by a huge avalanche, freezing them in time. 400 years later, they are unearthed, defrosted and forced to adjust to modern-day life. Using the Golden Wheel that unlocks the past, Ying must regain his honour and correct history, defeating his brothers once and for all in an almighty fight to the death.

programme.title: IP Man: The Awakening
programme.desc: The legendary Ip Man returns to the big screen to uncover the first action-packed chapter in the story of the man who would become a world-renowned martial arts master.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: During an extradition to South Korea, a group of dangerous criminals unite to stage a coordinated escape attempt from their floating prison. As the jailbreak escalates into a bloody riot, the fugitives and their allies from the outside exact a brutal terror campaign against the special agents onboard the cargo ship. But the prisoners aren't the only ones waiting to rise from the darkness.

programme.title: Renegade: Escape
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Cash
programme.desc: A stroke of good luck turns lethal for Sam Phelan and his wife Leslie when they are faced with a life-changing decision that brings strange and sinister Pyke Kubic to their doorstep.

programme.title: Outlawed
programme.desc: An action packed story of corruption and murder. Outnumbered, outgunned and against all odds, a Commando fights his way through a siege to save his girl.

programme.title: White Vengeance
programme.desc: Two inexplicably coherent zombies awake amidst a zombie attack, and decide to take a road trip

programme.title: Middle Of Nowhere
programme.desc: Ruby embarks on a journey of self-discovery when she drops out of medical school to focus on the welfare of her incarcerated husband.

programme.title: Seraphim Falls
programme.desc: The American Civil War has ended but Colonel Morsman Carver (Neeson) is on one final mission: to kill Gideon (Brosnan) no matter what it takes. Launched by a gunshot and propelled by rage, the relentless pursuit takes them both far from the comforts and codes of civilisation, into the bloodiest recesses of their own souls.

programme.title: A Love To Remember
programme.desc: Tenley, a horticulturist, works up the courage to meet her online crush, Jared. Tenley gets mistaken for Jared's wife and is forced to keep the lie up with Jared's family and his charming best friend, Everett, in order to save their company.

programme.title: Cinderella in the Caribbean
programme.desc: Ashlyn Vanderbilt travels with her stepmother Miriam and her fiancé Bruce for their destination wedding. Although Ashlyn finds friendship and love with Bruce's son, Noah, she struggles to have her happily ever after when she discovers that her stepfamily plans to ruin Bruce.

programme.title: Uncle Nino
programme.desc: Overworked executive Robert Micelli has little time for his family that has become disconnected from one another. When Robert's long-lost Uncle Nino unexpectedly arrives on their doorstep from Italy for a visit, Nino's simple, old-fashioned ways help the Micelli's discover the joy of La Famiglia.

programme.title: Quest For Love
programme.desc: Mackenzie travels to Costa Rica for work. Her best friend Ethan comes along to get romantic inspiration for his action /adventure novel. Mackenzie has loved Ethan for a long time, but he only sees her as a friend--until a tourist named Lucas makes Ethan see Mackenzie in a new light.

programme.title: Death Rides a Horse
programme.desc: A young gunfighter plans to track down and eliminate the bandits who killed his family, and forms a tenuous alliance with an aging ex-outlaw, till the surprising end.

programme.title: Raise Your Hands, Dead Man, You're Under Arrest
programme.desc: The sole survivor, named Sando Kid (Peter Lee Lawrence), of a massacre in the North seeks revenge. After suffering the atrocity, the Kid executes a solo revenge, razes, beats and kills everyone involved in the massacre.

programme.title: Two Crosses at Danger Pass
programme.desc: Judy and Alex are the only two survivors of a punitive mission ordered by the rich and ruthless Moran.... The girl becomes his maid and the boy is adopted by a Quaker family. Alex, despite the philosophy of forgiveness he has been taught, plans to take revenge.

programme.title: Return of Shanghai Joe
programme.desc: A sinister town boss called Pat Barnes has exploited almost everyone in the town.

programme.title: Gunfight at Red Sands
programme.desc: An avenging outsider riddles a gang of ruthless bandits in revenge for the murder of his family.

programme.title: Life With Music
programme.desc: In this life affirming story of hope, struggling pianist finds inspiration with a free-spirited music critic.

programme.title: Bridal Boot Camp
programme.desc: Andy Phillips is preparing for her upcoming wedding with her fiancé, Jordan. However, after chatting with her best friend, Andy starts to question if she has what it takes to make a strong a lasting marriage.

programme.title: Love Under The Stars
programme.desc: When a 30-something woman living in an infinite state of youth is finally forced out into the real world, she befriends a young girl and a widower that will teach her that it is okay to grow up.

programme.title: My Boyfriends Dogs
programme.desc: Bailey struggles to find love as every man she dates turns out to be more of a dog than the ones she gets stuck with when they leave.

programme.title: 2 Years of Love
programme.desc: Samantha has a great marriage, until the pressure to have a baby comes up. Things get tricky when she starts falling for one of her clients, not realizing it is secretly her husband. Will they be able to make it through this rough patch?

programme.title: Saints and Soldiers 3: Battle of the Tanks
programme.desc: The German war machine is in retreat. Two American M 18 tank destroyers are sent to root out a die hard group of Nazis holed up in the Harz Mountains.

programme.title: The Way
programme.desc: Driven by his desire to understand his lost son, Tom (Martin Sheen) decides to embark on an historical pilgrimage.

programme.title: All Roads Lead to Rome
programme.desc: Uptight mother Maggie and her former Italian lover, Luca, go on a road trip across scenic Italy pursuing Maggie's rebellious teenage daughter who is trying desperately to return to New York.

programme.title: Anything
programme.desc: Anything is a heart-warming film about the power of love and acceptance. Grief-stricken over the recent death of his wife, Early Landry moves from Mississippi to Los Angeles in the hope of starting a new life. He quickly finds himself in an intense friendship with his transgender neighbour, Freda. However, the simplicity of their shared loneliness and growing affection must be reconciled with the complexity of their disparate backgrounds.

programme.title: The Mistery Of Mr. Wong
programme.desc: Detective tries to solve the murder of antiques collector who was in possession of a famous jewel known as "The Eye of the Daughter of The Moon."

programme.title: The Money Order
programme.desc: A money order from a relative in Paris throws the life of a Senegalese family man out of order. He deals with corruption, greed, problematic family members, the locals and the changing

programme.title: The Most Beautiful
programme.desc: During World War II, the management of a war industry of optical instruments for weapons requests an effort from the workers to increase the productivity during four months. The target for male workers is an increase of 100% of the production, but the female workers, led by the dedicated Tsuru Watanabe, ask the direction to surpass their goal from 50% to 70%. During the period, the women have to overcome illness and their personal problems to complete their quota.

programme.title: The Mother of the Lamb
programme.desc: Cristina (49) has spent her life taking care of her mother Carmen. Single and without a trade or friends, she grows older, year after year in her hometown. A few days from her birth- day, Cristina reconnects with Sandra, a former schoolmate who will show

programme.title: The Naked Kiss
programme.desc: Kelly, a prostitute, traumatised by an experience, referred to as 'The Naked Kiss,' by psychiatrists, leaves her past, and finds solace in the town of Grantville. She meets Griff, the police captain of the town, with whom she spends a romantic afternoon. Kelly finds a job as a nurse in a hospital for handicapped children. The work helps her find her sensitive side in the caring and helping of her young patients. Kelly's path towards happiness is thrown amiss, when she witnesses a shocking event, which threatens not just her happiness, but her mental health as well.

programme.title: House of Cards
programme.desc: A widow tries to find out why her daughter's strange behavior, a reaction to the death of her father, is progressively worsening.

programme.title: Shortcut to Happiness
programme.desc: A down-and-out writer sells his soul to the devil in exchange for fame and fortune. Starring: Alec Baldwin, Anthony Hopkins, Kim Cattrall, Dan Aykroyd, Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: The Keeper
programme.desc: The Keeper tells the incredible true story of Bert Trautmann, a German soldier and POW who, against a backdrop of British post-war protest and prejudice, secures the position of goalkeeper at Manchester City, and in doing so becomes a footballing icon.

programme.title: Misconduct
programme.desc: An ambitious lawyer is caught between a corrupt pharmaceutical executive and his firm's senior partner. When the case turns deadly, he must find the truth or lose everything.

programme.title: The White King
programme.desc: Djata is a care-free 12-year-old growing up in a brutal dictatorship shut off from the outside world. When the government imprisons his father, Peter, and Djata and his mother Hannah are labeled traitors, the boy will not rest until he sees his father again.

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: Barbara Thorson (Madison Wolfe) is a teenage girl who escapes the realities of school and a troubled family life by retreating into her magical world of fighting evil giants. With the help of her new friend Sophia (Sydney Wade) and her school counsellor (Zoe Saldana), Barbara learns to face her fears and battle the giants that threaten her world.

programme.title: Cosmic Sin
programme.desc: Bruce Willis and Frank Grilo star in a science fiction action drama as s even rogue soldiers launch a pre-emptive strike against a newly discovered alien civilization in the hopes of ending an interstellar war before it starts.

programme.title: Warning
programme.desc: Black Mirror meets Wild Tales in this visually-arresting, thought-provoking sci-fi thriller exploring the meaning of life through multiple interconnected lives. This highly original film stars Annabelle Wallis (Peaky Blinders, Annabelle), Thomas Jane (The Mist), Alex Pettyfer (Magic Mike), Patrick Schwarzenegger (Daniel isn't Real), Alice Eve (She's Out of My League) and Rupert Everett (The Happy Prince).

programme.title: Mr. Write
programme.desc: When editor Dori meets her idol, romance novelist Michael, she's crushed to learn he doesn't really believe in true love. But with both of their careers on the line they are forced to work together to make his next book a success. As the project takes shape, Dori inspires Michael in a way that revives his faith in love and the two get a chance at their own happy ending.

programme.title: Discreet
programme.desc: Monique, a high-class escort, has always given her clients what they wanted, while clean-cut Thomas, has always been what everyone has expected.

programme.title: Mediator
programme.desc: A family counselor in the missing children's division becomes a mediator between the living and the missing.

programme.title: Basmati Blues
programme.desc: Linda Watt (Brie Larson: Room, 21 Jump Street) is a sheltered but brilliant young scientist who is plucked out of her company's lab and sent to India by her CEO (Donald Sutherland: The Hunger Games) to sell "Rice 9," a genetically modified rice she's created.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo Boyd (Gerard Butler), a down-on-his-luck bounty hunter, gets his dream job when he is assigned to track down his bail-jumping ex-wife, reporter Nicole Hurly (Jennifer Aniston). He thinks all that's ahead is an easy payday, but when Nicole gives him the slip so she can chase a lead on a murder cover-up, Milo realizes that nothing ever goes simply with him and Nicole. The exes continually one-up each other – until they find themselves on the run for their lives. They thought their promise to love, honor and obey was tough – staying alive is going to be a whole lot tougher. Andy Tennant (Hitch, Sweet Home Alabama) directs.

programme.title: Top End Wedding
programme.desc: Top End Wedding is a feel-good road trip comedy from the producers of The Sapphires. Engaged and in love Lauren and Ned have just 10 days until their dream wedding in the remote far north of Australia. But there's only one issue... Lauren's mother has gone AWOL! The couple embarks on a fantastic road trip to find her. But will they find her in time and will their love resist the ultimate test?

programme.title: Sky
programme.desc: While on vacation in California, Romy breaks things off once and for all with her boorish husband in a dramatic final fight. A free woman in a strange land, Romy embarks on a life-changing trip through the desert that brings in her touch with strangers who impact her life in various ways: a kindly small town police officer, a pregnant, trailer park-dwelling mother, and a charming, ruggedly independent cowboy with whom she finds the possibility of new love.

programme.title: From Prada to Nada
programme.desc: Two spoiled sisters who have been left penniless are forced to move in with their estranged aunt.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: A young Marine corporal's unique bond with her combat dog saves many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: Destroyer
programme.desc: LAPD detective Erin Bell is placed undercover with a gang in the California desert with tragic results.

programme.title: Kill the Irishman
programme.desc: The true story of a tough Irish thug working for mobsters in Cleveland during the 1970s.

programme.title: Bar Fight!
programme.desc: Time to settle the score, one drink at a time. Theres only one way to assert dominance after a break up and for Nina (Melissa Fumero, Brooklyn Nine-Nine) and Allen (Luka Jones, Up All Night) its a turf war for their local watering hole. Lines have been drawn and with the help of Ninas best friend Chelsea (Rachel Bloom, Crazy Ex-Girlfriend) its going to be a winner takes all affair.

programme.title: All About Sex
programme.desc: Join Morgan, Casey and Sage in the sizzling, provocative and hilarious All About Sex. Three friends in their mid-20s navigate their professional and personal lives in the big city as they collide head on with the messy, hilarious and sometimes dreadful growing pains of adulthood. Written and directed by, as well as starring Dakota Gorman (Teen Wolf), All About Sex also stars Natalee Linez (Siren).

programme.title: Savage
programme.desc: Snowed in, no way out and cut off from the world atop a mountain, a lone police officer must hold out until his transfer arrives. One routine day soon turns into a fight for survival, in this stylish action-packed thriller as a group of armed thieves arrive at the door. Seeking shelter, theyre not taking no for an answer. Its kill or be killed and theres nowhere to run. A must watch!

programme.title: The Girl Who Invented Kissing
programme.desc: This hard-hitting drama follows a nameless, pill-popping drifter played by Suki Waterhouse (Love, Rosie). Upon meeting reclusive brothers Jimmy (Dash Mihok: Silver Linings Playbook) and Victor (Vincent Piazza: Jersey Boys) "The Girl Who Invented Kissing" soon upsets the balance of their lives, while bringing both trouble and new life into their world. Heart-wrenching and effortless - a must watch!

programme.title: Deadly Vows
programme.desc: Pastry chef Helena poisons men who don't meet her high standards. Her fiancé's sister begins to be suspicious of her actions. Starring Brittany Underwood (2017)

programme.title: Accidental Switch
programme.desc: After picking up the wrong suitcase, a woman receives a call from a man claiming he will kill her daughter if his bag is not retuned. Starring Jamie Luner (2016)

programme.title: Stranger In The House
programme.desc: A woman suspects her new stepmother of killing her father. Starring Emmanuelle Vaugier (2016)

programme.title: I Am Wrath
programme.desc: A former CIA operative seeks brutal vengeance upon the thugs who murdered his wife and the corrupt cops who are protecting them. Stars John Travolta, Christopher Meloni (2016)

programme.title: Cash
programme.desc: A couple stumble across a suitcase of money, however the owner sets out recover what is unlawfully his and takes them on a whirlwind ride just to survive. Starring Chris Hemsworth and Sean Bean (2010)

programme.title: A Picture Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: Young influential New Yorker, Josh, hires Lindsey to photograph his sister's wedding. Will the romantic setting cause sparks to fly between Josh and Lindsey? (2020)

programme.title: A Midnight Kiss
programme.desc: With only one week's notice to prepare, Mia enlists a relative stranger to help her plan a client's New Year's Eve party. But did she plan on falling in love? Stars Carlos PenaVega. (2018)

programme.title: Bridal Wave
programme.desc: A woman planning for her wedding at a resort meets a charming local right before the ceremony. Starring Andrew W Walker (2015)

programme.title: The Convenient Groom
programme.desc: Dr. Kate is a romance guru with a hit radio show. But when she is unexpectedly dumped by her fiancé during their engagement party, will someone come to the rescue and protect her dignity? (2016)

programme.title: Blueprint to the Heart
programme.desc: TV presenter Tiffany reluctantly gives divorcee Brooks a lifestyle makeover for her new show. Can Brooks's charm help raise the show's ratings, or will he raise Tiffany's heart instead? (2020)

programme.title: Ricki and the flash
programme.desc: Meryl Streep as you have never seen her before, a hard-rocking singer/guitarist, in Ricki and the Flash, from Oscar®-winning director Jonathan Demme and Academy Award®-winning screenwriter Diablo Cody. In an original and electrifying film loaded with live musical performances, Streep stars as Ricki Rendazzo, a guitar heroine who made a world of mistakes as she followed her dreams of rock-and-roll stardom. Returning home, Ricki gets a shot at redemption and a chance to make things right as she faces the music with her family.

programme.title: Behind The Line
programme.desc: Occupied France, 1940. A Nazi Commander discovers one of his prisoners, Danny (Sam Gittins) is a champion boxer. He forces him to fight for his companies entertainment. But the POWs realise they can use these contests, as cover for an audacious breakout, before they're sent to Germany, where escape will be almost impossible. Their fate and freedom may all come down to how long Danny can keep fighting.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students. But gaining entrance to this utopia is only half the battle. Now they must compete with a group of the nation's most elite, tech-savvy geniuses to prove that necessity really is the mother of re-invention.

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Andrew Neyman is an ambitious young jazz drummer, single-minded in his pursuit to rise to the top of his elite east coast music conservatory. Terence Fletcher, an instructor known equally for his teaching talents and his terrifying methods, discovers Andrew and transfers him into his band. Andrew's passion to achieve perfection soon spirals into obsession, as his ruthless teacher continues to push him to the brink of both his ability and his sanity.

programme.title: Vertical Limit
programme.desc: A brother mounts an extraordinary rescue effort to save his sister who is trapped on the world's most dangerous peak.

programme.title: Armored
programme.desc: A young armored car guard is persuaded by his veteran cohorts to empty the truck of its $10 Million.

programme.title: Tears Of The Sun
programme.desc: A Navy SEAL's assignment to rescue an American doctor marooned in wartorn Nigeria runs into unexpected complications.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Mexico
programme.desc: Returning from exile to avenge his slain family, the gun-slinging, guitar-toting "Desperado" dispenses justice the hard way.

programme.title: Little Man
programme.desc: A short, baby-faced jewel thief masquerades as a baby to try to recover a stolen diamond.

programme.title: Jack And Jill
programme.desc: Jack and Jill is a comedy focusing on Jack Sadelstein (Adam Sandler), a successful advertising executive in Los Angeles with a beautiful wife and kids, who dreads one event each year: the Thanksgiving visit of his identical twin sister Jill (also Adam Sandler). Jill's neediness and passive-aggressiveness is maddening to Jack, turning his normally tranquil life upside down. Katie Holmes plays Erin, Jack's wife.

programme.title: The Wedding Ringer
programme.desc: After a barbershop manager advises his best friend to break off his engagement, he unexpectedly falls in love with the jilted fiancee, testing both his new romance and his friendship.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: Death at a Funeral is a hilarious day in the life of an American family come together to put a beloved husband and father to rest. As mourners gather at the family home, shocking revelations, festering resentments, ugly threats, blackmail and a misdirected corpse unleash lethal and riotous mayhem.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Chronicling the adventures of an eccentric, resilient and tight-knit family, THE GLASS CASTLE is a remarkable story of unconditional love. Oscar® winner Brie Larson brings Jeannette Walls's best-selling memoir to life as a young woman who, influenced by the joyfully wild nature of her deeply dysfunctional father (Woody Harrelson), found the fiery determination to carve out a successful life on her own terms.

programme.title: The Healer
programme.desc: As much as Alec yearns to avoid being attributed any healing powers, more bizarre events keep occurring. Alec, in shock, is discovering the family secret he possesses, a gift… the gift of healing, a gift he must accept or reject. The arrival of Abigail, a teenage girl with terminal cancer, wise beyond her years, provides Alec with one last chance to consider his life's purpose.

programme.title: Astronaut (2019)
programme.desc: Angus is an elderly widower living out his retirement days in a typically dysfunctional modern family. When a billionaire businessman announces, live on television, a once-in-a-lifetime competition to grant three civilians a place on a commercial test flight into space, Angus sees his chance to live out what has been a lifelong dream. Lying about his age, Angus enters the competition, only to win one of the three golden tickets. But will he ultimately make it onto the flight and see his dreams realised or will reality bring him straight back down to earth?

programme.title: To Write Love on Her Arms
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this musical drama tells the story of how artistic fantasy, music and friendships helped teenager Renee embark on a courageous journey towards recovery.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: Brothers tells the powerful story of two siblings, thirty-something Captain Sam Cahill and younger brother Tommy Cahill, who are polar opposites. A Marine about to embark on his fourth tour of duty, Sam is a steadfast family man married to his high school sweetheart, the aptly named Grace, with whom he has two young daughters. Tommy, his charismatic younger brother, is a drifter just out of jail who's always gotten by on wit and charm.

programme.title: Saints and Soldiers
programme.desc: Germany, May 1945, deep in the Harz Mountains a U.S. tank crew discovers a platoon of Germans preparing to ambush U.S. supply trucks. A deadly game of cat and mouse quickly unfolds as the Americans find themselves out-gunned and out-manned by three German tanks.Tension and fear begin to grow as the crew reluctantly decide they must stop the enemy from executing their deadly plan. Knowing that hundreds of lives are at stake they must put aside their differences and work together to fight a desperate battle against the greatest odds they have ever faced.

programme.title: There Be Dragons
programme.desc: Two men - childhood friends who become separated by the political turmoil of pre-war Spain only to find themselves on opposite sides when the war erupts. One becomes a priest, the other is an activist who becomes a spy for the fascist movement. As the battles are waged, the characters' lives collide and their deepest struggles are illuminated through the fateful choices they make.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III: Turtles in Time
programme.desc: The turtles have defeated their nemesis Shredder and are still forced to hide in the depths of the subway system. April brings them gifts to cheer them up and one of them is a time traveling device which takes the turtles and April back to feudal Japan. The turtles must fight to free the village and find a way home. Starring Elias Koteas ("Gattaca," "Shooter"), Paige Turco ("The Game Plan," "Invincible"), and Vivian Wu ("The Pillow Book," "The Last Emperor")

programme.title: Resident Evil: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Picking up after Resident Evil: Retribution, Alice (Milla Jovovich) is the only survivor of what was meant to be humanity's final stand against the Undead. Now, she must return to where the nightmare began – The Hive in Raccoon City, where the Umbrella Corporation is gathering its forces for a final strike against the only remaining survivors of the apocalypse.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: With the blue fin quota extended, all the crews look to take advantage, and fish hard. Drama on Hot Tuna as the bird breaks off, leaving the crew to fight the fish on the greenstick reel alone. Kahuna gets a fake dog mascot, since some other boats with dogs, seem to have good luck.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns move into the Outer Banks. Since they are more used to the dangerous conditions, the Southern captains, believe that have an advantage over the Northern boats. The Northern captains need to put Tuna on the deck if they want to beat the Southerners, but everyone must weigh the risk versus the reward.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: A heavy top dollar fish, caught by Zack Shackleford and his young Rasta Rocket crew, might just be a game changer, and puts pressure on the veterans of the fleet. Dave Marciano on Falcon tries trolling to catch more fish. Reel E Bugging steps up their effort.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: The Northern fleet are not going down without a fight, but the Southern fleet battles on to keep the lead. Some boats are taking risks and changing tactics, because they know that all it will take is one good sized fish to shake up the leader board.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Most of the crews of the fleet are getting desperate and are willing to try anything to catch the fish necessary to put them at the top of the leader board, but Reel E Bugging reckon they have it in the bag. One fish could make all the difference and a little bit of luck goes a long way.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Being away from home for extended periods of time, the crews are all feeling a little homesick, but at the back of everyone's mind is that they are doing what they do, to support those loved ones, and they need to take advantage of every last bit of quota to make that happen.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: With yet another storm moving in, and the quota dwindling before their eyes, Captains are realising that the season could end before they achieve their objectives. The decision to stay out fishing or run from the storm always needs to be a balance between safety and reward.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers

programme.title: Ocean's Africa

programme.title: Nature's Cutest
programme.desc: As we all know the natural world can be tough and challenging at times, but it can also be nothing short of adorable.

programme.title: Planet California: Close Encounters
programme.desc: From the majesty of blue whales and the menace of great white sharks to the curious habits of the kangaroo rat and playful kit foxes, rare and spectacular footage brings California's wildlife into sharp focus. Cataclysmic events like earthquakes and El Nino's storms rock and shape the land, yet some species - like Methuselah, one of the oldest organisms in the world - persist, constantly adapting to a rapidly changing world. Still, in a space shared with 40 million people, is there room for all? The pressure heats up in dramatic and challenging habitats. Move over Hollywood. Planet California's wildlife stars are ready for their close-up.

programme.title: Coasts
programme.desc: The crocodile is king of the wetland a tone of cold blooded monster with the most terrifying bite force on Earth. The product of a 100 million year ancestry, the 25 species around today are testament to the crocodile's supreme intelligence and adaptability.

programme.title: Lions On The Move
programme.desc: Kevin Richardson shares an extraordinary bond with Africa's most fearsome predators. Together with them, he has experienced some real adventures. However, transporting 27 lions and 14 hyenas to a new home presents a different challenge.

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: The "Parque Natural da Ria Formosa" is one of the largest lagoon conservation areas in Europe. Bordered by five natural islands. A mosaic of sandbanks, brackish and freshwater lagoons and salt marshes. In 2010, the "Ria Formosa" was chosen as one of the seven natural wonders of Portugal. It is a unique ecosystem: in the winter months, more than 20,000 birds gather here. In addition, the nature park has one of the largest seahorse populations internationally. More than half of all fish species in the Atlantic are said to spawn in the lagoon.

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: The highest mountain range in Portugal is the Serra da Estrela. The episode embarks on a voyage of discovery to adventurous rock formations and villages steeped in tradition. The nature park is the largest protected area on the Iberian peninsula. In the mountain range we accompany the young scientist Ana Matos, who wants to breathe new life into old traditions, and cheese maker Maria Natália Lopes. She watches over more than 350 sheeps.

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.sub-title: South West Portugal: Alentejano and Costa Vicentina
programme.desc: In the southwest of Portugal lies the little known Parque Natural do Sudoeste Alentejano e Costa Vicentina. It encompasses a narrow coastal strip that runs along the coast to the south of Portugal. Sparsely populated, this coastal region, which was placed under protection in 1988, is considered one of the last intact ecosystems in Europe. The steep cliffs, the almost constant wind and high waves have ensured that mass tourism has not gained a foothold here. There are still near-natural forests and a diverse bird life.

programme.title: Wild Bavaria: Wild Bavaria
programme.desc: The moon disappears behind the horizon and the stage is set for a new day in the Alps of Berchtesgaden.

programme.title: Wild Bavaria: Wild Bavaria
programme.sub-title: In The Shadow of the Watzmann.
programme.desc: Mighty and mysterious, King Watzmann sits above Germany's only alpine national park.

programme.title: North America's National Parks: America's National Parks
programme.desc: North America's National Parks are world famous and their breathtaking landscapes fascinate millions of visitors. This spectacular series will show you what happens beyond the lookouts. Everglades National Park is an American national park that protects the southern twenty percent of the original Everglades in Florida. The park is the largest tropical wilderness in the United States, and the largest wilderness of any kind east of the Mississippi River. An average of one million people visit the park each year. Everglades is the third-largest national park in the contiguous United States after Death Valley and Yellowstone. UNESCO declared the Everglades & Dry Tortugas Biosphere Reserve in 1976, and listed the park as a World Heritage Site in 1979, while the Ramsar Convention included the park on its list of Wetlands of International Importance in 1987. Everglades is one of only three locations in the world to appear on all three lists.

programme.title: Wilderness in Europe: The Bohemian Forest: Boundary Experiences in Mühlviertel
programme.desc: Pavel Hubeny, whose life would be unthinkable without the forest, is the head of the Šumava National Park. He is committed to ensuring that a primeval forest can grow for future generations, in which man does not interfere. This vision of a primeval forest is also shared by the forester Claus Bässler, who wants to counteract the extinction of species by having trees felled to create artificial deadwood and thus a new habitat for rare beetles and fungi. On the Vltava River lies the small town of Krumlov, the "Pearl of the Bohemian Forest" with its Baroque theater and fully preserved stage technology from the 17th century. Here the director Zuzana Vrbová enchants people from all over the world with her productions. Apart from agriculture, it was mainly the abundance of forests that ensured the livelihood of the inhabitants of the Bohemian Forest - including that of the carpenter Philipp von Manz, who processed local wood for his customers all over Germany. Veterinarian Judith Gollner, who grew up in the Austrian part of the Bohemian Forest, lived in Vienna for a long time and made a conscious decision to return. She likes the people and is proud of "her farmers' wives" who share her love of the Bohemian Forest.

programme.desc: Sausages - Jimmy and Jamie pitch British sausages against their German rivals, and Hollywood A-lister Gwyneth Paltrow comes to the caff to cook pasta with the boys and face a food fight of her own.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Together
programme.desc: Taco Party - Jamie cooks a relaxed chilled-out menu—serving up slow-cooked pork belly in handmade tacos topped with roasted pineapple, hot red pepper sauce, black beans, green salsa, and a red cabbage slaw.

programme.title: Jamie At Home
programme.desc: The quality of ingredients makes all the difference to a dish and lamb is no exception.

programme.title: Jamie At Home
programme.desc: A rather windswept Jamie explores the seemingly unlikely but bountiful world of winter salads.

programme.title: Jamie At Home
programme.desc: Having sadly been neglected for more exotic imports, rhubarb is finally having resurgence.

programme.title: Masterchef UK

programme.title: Scotland Starter
programme.desc: This week its the turn of the Scottish chefs Michael Smith, Tony Singh and Alan Murchison. Today its the battle of the starters. So which dish is going to fly the flag for Scotland? Will it be cock-a-leekie terrine, pigeon salad or Scotch pie,

programme.title: Scotland Fish
programme.desc: Today the Scottish chefs are all fighting for supremacy in the fish course. So whos going to come out on top, will it be lobster cocktail cooked four ways, lobster with vegetables or mussels and langoustine with sorrel soup and tattie scones?

programme.title: Scotland Main
programme.desc: Today its the battle of the main courses, as the Scottish chefs go all out to win, with their takes on hogget Scotch pie with peas and carrots, steak and chips with a tomato relish and lamb with haggis, pearl barley and turnip puree.

programme.title: Scotland Dessert
programme.desc: Today its the last chance for the Scottish chefs Michael Smith, Tony Singh and Alan Murchison to show theyve got what it takes to win. So which dessert will deliver the sweet smell of success?

programme.title: Scotland Judging
programme.desc: Its judgement day on Great British Menu and the two chefs who battled their way through yesterday, cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: North West Starter
programme.desc: Chefs from the North West Johnnie Mountain, Lisa Allen and Aiden Byrne battle it out in the kitchen. Former champion Marcus Wareing will scrutinise their dishes every day. Today its the starters so which dish will he think worthy of the banquet?

programme.title: North West Fish
programme.desc: Today sparks fly as the chefs from the North West Johnnie Mountain, Lisa Allen and Aiden Byrne are fighting to win the fish course. So which dish is going to be king?

programme.title: North West Main
programme.desc: Today its the battle of the main courses, as the chefs from the North West Aiden Byrne, Lisa Allen and Johnnie Mountain square off. The main course is the pivotal point of any many so which dish will get top marks.

programme.title: North West Dessert
programme.desc: Today its the last chance for the chefs Lisa Allen, Johnnie Mountain and Aiden Byrne to prove they are fit to cook at this years prestigious banquet. So which dessert will former champion Marcus Wareing award top marks?

programme.title: North West Judging
programme.desc: Its judgement day on Great British Menu. One chef left the competition yesterday and now two are left to go head to head, as they cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 12, Worlds 105 Kg (Part 2)
programme.desc: Its the second day, and the top 16 athletes have made it through to the final round. With another 4 events to go who will get the crown of world champion?

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 13, Ukraine
programme.desc: Welcome to Ukraine and the wonderful capital city of Kyiv. Were here for the second time for the iconic truck pull World Championships! The reigning World champion Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland will defend his title.

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 14, Romania
programme.desc: In this episode, a final chance for our athletes to get vital world series ranking points on board to give them the best possible chance of success and an initial advantage at the finals. It's the last show before the world finals and the top 10 places are up for grabs, but who will they be?

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 15, World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 16, World Finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: What a day ahead of us here in Alanya, just a handful of events to go before we find out who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League in 2021. These are the world finals, and all the big names are in the house. With just 3 events to go - who will take the crown of World Champion 2021 and be the STRONGEST?

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 1, Finland Stage 1
programme.desc: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. We're here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, you're in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 2, Holland Part 1
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they're going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they're all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let's see which shady looking character wins.
